name: Fyntechnical Innovations Inc
business: SMC Entertainment Inc. operates through its wholly owned subsidiary Fyniti, which provides a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform that combines Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) driven quantitative investing (IQ Engine) with AI-enabled wealth management tools for financial institutions.

exposures.sentence: Fyniti is a Fintech developer and provider of technology that combines Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) driven Quantitative investing (IQ Engine) with AI-enabled wealth management tools.

catalysts.sentence: Our go-to market timeline for public launch is the end of Q2/2025.
